ddls:
CREATE TABLE "webhooks" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each WebHook */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant account associated with the WebHook */,
  "callback_url" TEXT /* URL used to receive POST notifications */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the WebHook */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Status of the WebHook (enabled or disabled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the WebHook was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the WebHook was last updated */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant for easier reference */,
  "last_triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the WebHook was triggered */,
  "failure_count" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failures for the WebHook */,
  "retry_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of retries before disabling the WebHook */,
  "retry_interval" INTEGER /* Interval (in seconds) between retries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_webhooks_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES merchant_accounts ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "webhook_events" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WebHook event */,
  "webhook_id" TEXT /* ID of the WebHook associated with the event */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event type (e.g., TRANSFER_UPDATE, TRANSFER_CREATION, VALIDATION_RESULT) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  "last_triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the event was triggered for the WebHook */,
  "last_status" TEXT /* Last status of the event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "last_error_message" TEXT /* Error message from the last event trigger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_webhook_events_webhook_id FOREIGN KEY ("webhook_id") REFERENCES webhooks ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchant_accounts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the merchant account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the merchant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the merchant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the merchant account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the merchant account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
